entries.prompt: A primordial elemental of swirling raw cosmic energy, nebula core, crackling arms of plasma, dark fantasy RPG enemy portrait
An abyssal knight in deep-sea black coral armor, trident, glowing void eyes under helm, dark fantasy RPG enemy portrait
A floating reality shard entity, fragments of shattered mirror glass arranged as humanoid form, prismatic glow, dark fantasy RPG enemy portrait
A colossal genesis worm, segmented chitinous body, toothy sucker maw, glowing pink interior, dark fantasy RPG enemy portrait
A veil warden in ornate plate with glowing runes, crystal halberd, grim stoic visor, dark fantasy RPG enemy portrait
A cosmic titan of stone and galaxies, giant humanoid wreathed in nebulae, star-lit runes, dark fantasy RPG enemy portrait

Dark fantasy boss portrait: Warlord's Vanguard — a scarred, heavily-armored warlord general clad in spiked black iron plate, red tabard, cruel horned helm, wielding a massive two-handed greatsword. Grim battlefield atmosphere, dramatic lighting, menacing expression. Head-and-shoulders portrait, centered, facing viewer.

Pixel-art RPG sprite: Warlord's Vanguard boss, scarred warlord in spiked black iron plate armor with red tabard and cruel horned helm, wielding massive two-handed greatsword. Standing idle pose facing the camera (south/front view), feet planted, sword resting down. Full-body character sprite, centered, transparent background.

Pixel-art RPG sprite: Warlord's Vanguard boss, scarred warlord in spiked black iron plate armor with red tabard and cruel horned helm, wielding massive two-handed greatsword. Side-view walking pose facing east (right), mid-stride, sword held ready. Full-body character sprite, centered, transparent background.

Pixel-art RPG sprite: Warlord's Vanguard boss mid attack — scarred warlord in spiked black iron plate, red tabard, horned helm — side-view facing east (right), swinging massive two-handed greatsword overhead in powerful attack. Full-body sprite, centered, transparent background.

Pixel-art RPG sprite: Warlord's Vanguard boss defeated — scarred warlord in spiked black iron plate, horned helm — side-view facing east, collapsed on ground, knocked out, greatsword dropped beside. Full-body sprite, centered, transparent background.

Dark fantasy boss portrait: Archfiend Malgrath — towering demon lord with charcoal-black skin, massive curled ram horns, burning crimson eyes and cracked obsidian chestplate inscribed with glowing hellfire runes, torn leathery wings spread wide, wielding a jagged flaming black longsword. Infernal breach backdrop with lava cracks. Head-and-shoulders portrait, centered, facing viewer.

Pixel-art RPG sprite: Archfiend Malgrath boss, towering demon lord with charcoal skin, curled ram horns, burning crimson eyes, obsidian chestplate with hellfire runes, torn leathery wings, jagged flaming black longsword. Standing idle pose facing the camera (south/front view). Full-body sprite, centered, transparent background.

Pixel-art RPG sprite: Archfiend Malgrath boss, demon lord, side-view walking east (right), wings slightly unfurled, flaming black longsword held low, mid-stride. Full-body sprite, centered, transparent background.

Pixel-art RPG sprite: Archfiend Malgrath boss attacking — demon lord, side-view facing east, wings spread wide, swinging flaming black longsword in powerful overhead slash, hellfire trailing. Full-body sprite, centered, transparent background.

Pixel-art RPG sprite: Archfiend Malgrath boss defeated — demon lord collapsed on ground, wings tattered and crumpled, horns dim, flaming sword extinguished, side-view facing east. Full-body sprite, centered, transparent background.

Dark fantasy boss portrait: The Primordial King — ancient leviathan king of the abyssal depths, bioluminescent deep-sea monarch with barnacle-encrusted golden crown fused to a craggy shell-plated head, four glowing cyan eyes, tentacle beard, rusted regalia and broken trident, dripping with abyssal water. Deep-sea ruins backdrop. Head-and-shoulders portrait, centered, facing viewer.

Pixel-art RPG sprite: The Primordial King boss, ancient leviathan king with barnacle crown, shell-plated head, four glowing cyan eyes, tentacle beard, rusted regalia, broken trident. Standing idle pose facing the camera (south/front view). Full-body sprite, centered, transparent background.

Pixel-art RPG sprite: The Primordial King boss, leviathan king, side-view facing east, mid-stride walking forward, trident held low, tentacles trailing, water dripping. Full-body sprite, centered, transparent background.

Pixel-art RPG sprite: The Primordial King boss attacking — leviathan king, side-view facing east, thrusting broken trident forward in a powerful stab, torrent of water blasting from trident tips. Full-body sprite, centered, transparent background.

Pixel-art RPG sprite: The Primordial King boss defeated — leviathan king collapsed, crown toppled, trident broken beside him, glowing eyes dim, side-view facing east. Full-body sprite, centered, transparent background.

Dark fantasy boss portrait: The Architect — godlike artificer entity, body of interlocking obsidian geometric panels floating apart, halo of rotating runic rings behind head, face a featureless silver mask with glowing gold constellation-eye, hands wreathed in blueprints of light, wielding gilded compass-scepter. Cosmic workshop backdrop with floating gears. Head-and-shoulders portrait, centered, facing viewer.

Pixel-art RPG sprite: The Architect boss, godlike artificer entity, body of floating interlocking obsidian geometric panels, silver mask with gold constellation eye, rotating rune rings halo, gilded compass-scepter. Standing idle pose facing the camera (south/front view). Full-body sprite, centered, transparent background.

Pixel-art RPG sprite: The Architect boss, geometric artificer entity, side-view facing east, gliding forward, panels shifting in sync, compass-scepter held ready, halo rings rotating. Full-body sprite, centered, transparent background.

Pixel-art RPG sprite: The Architect boss attacking — geometric artificer, side-view facing east, compass-scepter extended projecting glowing gold blueprint-matrix beam of cosmic construction, panels flaring outward. Full-body sprite, centered, transparent background.

Pixel-art RPG sprite: The Architect boss defeated — panels shattered and scattered on ground, mask cracked showing dim light within, halo rings broken, scepter fallen, side-view facing east. Full-body sprite, centered, transparent background.
